(Re-Notice) Of Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Request For Production And Special Interrogatories
Off Calendar Sep-20-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
K. nina Reynolds for defendant and moving party: Paul Brennan
John P. Baba for plaintiff and opposing party: Jean Brandt

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Paul Brennan's motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents and special interrogatories is granted in part and denied in part.
Request for production (set 4) number 7 to Utnehmer is Denied. The Court finds neither an express nor an implied waiver of the taxpayer's return privilege.
Request for production (set 4) numbers 1 and 2 to Brandt, special interrogatory (set 2) number 25 is Denied at this time.
Special interrogatory (set 2) number 25 to Utnehmer is Granted. A supplemental verified response shall be served on or before September 27, 2006. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
